title: BUILDon (B) Price Prediction 2026-2027
content:
Analyzing the price movement of BUILDon (B) requires a systematic evaluation of historical data and current market indicators. As of {{LIVE_DATE}}, the broader market continues to consolidate near a $2.69T total valuation, with Bitcoin dominance holding steady at 58.1%. These market conditions influence the liquidity flow into sub-sectors such as meme tokens, where BUILDon currently competes with alternatives like MemeCore and Siren.

| Metric | Details |
| :--- | :--- |
| Live Price | {{LIVE_PRICE}} |
| Market Cap | {{LIVE_MARKET_CAP}} |
| 30d High | $0.242429 |
| 30d Low | $0.125920 |

## Current Price and Recent Performance
Over the past 30 days, BUILDon has exhibited significant movement, with a 66.65% change in value. The historical data shows a 30-day high of $0.242429 and a low of $0.125920, with an average price of $0.187990. On a one-year basis, the token has navigated significant volatility, with the price currently fluctuating significantly away from its 1-year high of $0.715161.

## Technical Support and Resistance
Key support levels have historically formed near the $0.125920 range, mirroring the recent 30-day and 1-year lows. If this support level holds, the asset may attempt to test resistance levels established by its recent high of $0.242429. Conversely, failing to maintain current levels could lead to testing new lows, as seen in the broader sector performance.

## Comparison to ATH and ATL
BUILDon reached an all-time high (ATH) of $0.731588 on August 31, 2025. Its current price represents a significant departure from this peak, down roughly 82%. However, its recovery from the all-time low (ATL) of $0.082973, recorded on October 10, 2025, indicates persistent buyer interest that keeps the asset above its cycle-bottom markers.

## Market Cap Growth Scenarios
In a bullish scenario, continued ecosystem expansion and high social narrative strength could see the market cap retest the $200M+ range. In a base-case scenario, the token tracks the growth of the overall BNB Chain ecosystem. In a bear-case scenario, particularly if the market-wide risk appetite declines, the token could face downward pressure, necessitating a reassessment of its current support levels.

## Risk Factors and Comparison
With a Risk Score of 7 and a Volatility Index of 95, BUILDon is highly sensitive to market shocks. Compared to projects like MemeCore or Siren, BUILDon relies heavily on its meme-based community narrative, which can prove fickle. Investors should prioritize data-backed trend analysis over speculative outlooks. ---
